title: Hi beloved mine, welcome to Our Wrapped
January - a New Year for both of us
text: It was our first January together, maybe it was a though one, you got a new job, I didn't have one, but we had each other, maybe that's what mattered the most and well, we made it through - thought we didn't get the chance to go out much.

title: February - Other Quiet Month
text: Well, three months have passed since we started dating. I got the job, you became more comfortable at yours, and this month Jisoo released a song called Earthquick. I remember how excited you were about it. It was a quiet month again, and I didn’t have much money to take you out and believe, remembering that makes me so sad
March - I told my mom
title: Can you believe this? You probably don’t remember when I told you about it, but this month I took my mom out and told her about our relationship. I was really scared — it was my first time talking about something like that. I felt happy and very afraid at the same time
April - Full of joys?
text: Do you remember our duck and this coffee shop? This month we did a lot of things together, however I think the best memory I have from this month is when we went to that coffee shop and you ate that duck
May - Why are we always eating?
title: We went to another restaurant, the Mexican restaurant in the Nuestro Bogota You were enormously beautiful that day (well you're always pretty).

text: Do you remember our first experience playing video games? that day was quite funny, specially when we played the virtual reality game , you were so cute trying to hit those targets. I think we should play again sometime.

title: We even had our first korean bbq experience, that day the Chef was too beautiful
text: BTW you were the chef

title: I'm under development, please be patient!
